title: Smash and Dash
overview: Clarence, a Chef from Chicago, is very passionate about two things, food and love. After being jilted at the altar, Clarence's friends Lakeith and Buddy, immediately urge him to get back into the dating pool, but under one condition, and that is for him to "Smash and Dash". Clarence needs to hook up with as many women as he possibly can through a dating app without falling in love.
